Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: All four listed findings are directly supported in the Results and Conclusion: polyphyletic high activity, at least three independent origins from low-activity ancestors, occurrence after duplication supporting convergent betalain origins, and contributions from convergent/divergent/unique substitutions.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: These methods are all explicitly used in the paper for DODA analysis.
